channel.title: Silver Health Daily
channel.description: Warm, practical health guides and free tools for everyday wellness. Nutrition, movement, sleep, and heart health — written to be read in minutes, not medical textbooks.

item.title: The Best Daily Stretching Routine
item.description: A gentle 10-minute stretch sequence — improve flexibility, reduce stiffness, and start the day right.

item.title: Managing Type 2 Diabetes: A Practical Overview
item.description: A practical overview of blood sugar control, diet, movement, and monitoring for type 2 diabetes.

item.title: Gut Health & Probiotics: What the Evidence Says
item.description: How digestion changes, whether probiotics help, and simple habits for a healthier gut.

item.title: Osteoporosis Exercises for Bone Health
item.description: Weight-bearing and resistance exercises that support bone density — safely.

item.title: Healthy Breakfast Ideas That Actually Fill You Up
item.description: Quick, nutritious breakfast options — high protein, easy to prepare, and blood-sugar friendly.

item.title: Balance Exercises to Prevent Falls
item.description: Simple balance drills you can do at home to reduce fall risk — with progressions for every fitness level.

item.title: How to Lower Blood Pressure Naturally
item.description: Evidence-based lifestyle changes that reduce blood pressure without relying on pills alone.

item.title: 7 Signs of Dehydration You Shouldn't Ignore
item.description: Dehydration symptoms people often miss — and when to seek medical care.

item.title: 15 Cholesterol-Lowering Foods to Eat Regularly
item.description: Everyday foods that support healthy cholesterol levels — plus what to limit.

item.title: Best At-Home Exercises (No Equipment Needed)
item.description: Safe at-home exercises — build strength, balance, and mobility with zero gym equipment.

item.title: Vitamin D and Your Health: What You Should Know
item.description: Why vitamin D matters for bones, immunity, and mood — and how to know if you're getting enough.

item.title: Best Bedtime for Your Wake-Up Time
item.description: How 90-minute sleep cycles help you pick a bedtime that matches your alarm — and wake up less groggy.

item.title: How Much Protein Do You Need Every Day?
item.description: Daily protein guidelines by age and activity, plus simple ways to hit your target without overcomplicating meals.

item.title: Target Heart Rate When Walking for Exercise
item.description: How to find your moderate heart rate zone for brisk walking — and when to check with your doctor first.

item.title: Understanding Blood Pressure: A Plain-Language Guide
item.description: What blood pressure numbers mean, why they change over time, and lifestyle steps that support cardiovascular health.

item.title: Memory Exercises That Actually Help
item.description: Evidence-based brain training habits — not gimmicks — to support memory and mental sharpness.

item.title: How to Stay Hydrated Every Day
item.description: Why dehydration happens, how much water you need, and simple habits to drink enough every day.

item.title: Low-Impact Exercises for Joint Pain
item.description: Gentle exercises that strengthen muscles around painful joints — including options for knees, hips, and shoulders.

item.title: How Much Sleep Do Adults Really Need?
item.description: Sleep needs change over time. Learn recommended hours, why sleep quality matters, and habits that help you rest better.

item.title: Heart-Healthy Foods Worth Eating More Often
item.description: Seven food patterns that support cardiovascular health — backed by common dietary guidelines, not fad diets.

item.title: Best Walking Routines for Everyday Fitness
item.description: A practical walking plan — safe pacing, weekly structure, and tips to stay consistent without joint strain.
